title: Discover Finland’s Fiskars Village Art & Design Biennale
content:
Fiskars Village Art and Design Biennale brings together art, science, architecture and design, 7.6–30.8.2026 in Fiskars, Finland.

content:

content:

content:

title: Blog: How do art works end up inside the European Parliament?
content:
We spoke with curator Jan Randáček to find out, including how Finnish artists Inka Bell and Elina Brotherus made it into the collection.
